/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-ar qc libqosal.a CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/qerr_common.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/qmalloc.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/freertos/qerr.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/freertos/qirq.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/freertos/qmalloc.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/freertos/qprofiling.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/freertos/qmsg_queue.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/freertos/qmutex.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/freertos/qpm.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/freertos/qprivate.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/freertos/qrand.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/freertos/qsemaphore.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/freertos/qsignal.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/freertos/qthread.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/freertos/qtime.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/freertos/qworkqueue.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/freertos/qtracing.c.obj CMakeFiles/qosal.dir/src/freertos/qos.c.obj
/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-ranlib libqosal.a
